summary_sections.title: Key Concepts: pH & pOH Scale
summary_sections.content_html:
Core Definitions

  • pH Scale: Measures hydrogen ion concentration; ranges from 0 (most acidic) to 14 (most basic); 7 is neutral.
  • pOH: Measures hydroxide ion concentration. pH + pOH = 14 at 25°C.
  • Acidic Solution: pH < 7 (high [H⁺], low [OH⁻]).
  • Basic Solution: pH > 7 (low [H⁺], high [OH⁻]).
